frameCountClarification: 8 FPS is playback speed. The current walk loop contains four frames per direction, not eight or nine frames.

grounding.shadow: faint contact ellipse beneath each active actor
grounding.stationaryRule: never play walk animation from an action label alone
grounding.sideTurnRule: human east and west movement uses a complete horizontal body sheet; west mirrors the east sheet and never shifts only the head

wardrobeLayers.currentScope: top and bottom color layers; hair, body, shoes, accessories and garment silhouettes remain separate future authored layers

poolActivity.entry: actor walks along explicit perimeter waypoints to the current shot or waiting station
poolActivity.loop: 8 FPS directional walk only while coordinates change
poolActivity.alignment: shooter stops at a frozen stance and faces the cue ball before the shot
poolActivity.exit: turn advances only after shot launch, then the next actor receives a new station route
poolActivity.fallback: none, running in place is rejected

knownLimitations: These sheets require direct mobile browser approval at actual game scale.
The current art remains temporary bridge art and is not the final approved character illustration standard.
The layered renderer currently changes top and bottom colors but does not yet swap authored garment silhouettes, hair, accessories or shoes.
Unique activity sheets remain under the separate activity replacement program.
The migration branch is not approved for main promotion until direct browser testing passes.
